patch.value: Adversarially verify the 78 open backlog items for duplicates (against open + closed historical items) and definition quality (clear titles, meaningful descriptions, type-appropriate structured fields, correct parents, sensible priority/tags).
All 78 open items checked for dup against open+closed; >=40 items + all epics/stories quality-checked; duplicates and quality issues reported with concrete IDs and fixes.

value.author: verify-dedup-agent
value.text: Phase 1 complete: read all 78 open backlog items via pm get (4 batches). Identified story-feature pairs linked by 'related' deps (mt7k<->qq69, 9mjw<->i17g, gbbn<->d70h, ijd9<->5vsv, 10ml<->oh5h, vhd9<->1lkm, sz6w<->0hnu/6m3y, izsi<->13bn/nf2q, arew<->ec4s, g94b<->puvn, ankr<->y138, 77t3<->hywv, fhsg<->22x2/7tsx, tnk5<->cxdg) - these are intentional PM, not dupes. Starting Phase 2: closed-history dedup search.

value.author: verify-dedup-agent
value.text: Closed-history dedup: ran ~18 targeted searches across all themes (schema, close-many, update-many, gc, search-status, onboarding, changelog, history-compact/diff, validate/health remediation, MCP narrow tools, corpus, eval harness, telemetry analytics, contract snapshot, link-check). NO open item duplicates a closed historical item. Closed matches are always PRIOR DISTINCT work (e.g. pm-lf6s implemented update-many; pm-1h99 adds --ids; pm-e1va/fy8o shipped add-type, pm-qq69/k8ik add list/show+remove). Most-overlapping internal pair: pm-22x2 (Task) vs pm-fhsg (Story) - near-identical nDCG eval-harness acceptance criteria, same parent pm-ydp6.

value.author: verify-dedup-agent
value.text: Phase 2+3 complete. DUPLICATES: zero true dupes (open or closed). 14 story<->feature pairs are intentional PM (linked by 'related'). Only borderline: pm-22x2 (Task) vs pm-fhsg (Story) have near-identical nDCG eval-harness acceptance criteria + same parent - flagged as near-dup-by-type-confusion (the Task should be a Feature implementing the Story, or merged). QUALITY: all 78 items have clear titles + meaningful descriptions; ALL Features/Stories/Chores/Issues/Tasks carry acceptance_criteria; all 8 capability epics have goal/objective/value + parent=pm-doxj; every backlog item's parent resolves to a valid existing item; no orphans. Minor: pm-m2u1 (ADR-log epic) lacks parent=pm-doxj (all other epics have it); epic 'goal' field is uniformly the milestone vision string rather than epic-specific.

patch.value: Verified all 78 open backlog items for dedup + definition quality. No true duplicates vs open or 902-item closed history; 14 story<->feature pairs are intentional. Backlog definition quality is high: all items have AC, all epics have goal/objective/value+parent, no orphans. Flagged 1 near-dup (pm-22x2 Task vs pm-fhsg Story) + 1 minor hierarchy gap (pm-m2u1 missing parent=pm-doxj).
Verification task completed during living-map closeout
The task checks its assigned living-map quality area and records whether any blocker remains before PR finalization.
The closed Task 'Verify living-map: dedup & definition quality' completed its verification pass and left no duplicate or hierarchy blocker for finalization.
